task: Hide internal RAG terminology from VP-facing training copy

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing answer changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Replaced Day 1 visible 'RAG 근거' copy with beginner-friendly '여러 교육 자료' and 'AI 활용 교육' wording.
Changed the planned Day 3 focus from 'RAG 자료 활용 기준' to '수집된 자료 활용 기준'.
Replaced the Day 0 bridge answer text 'RAG나 출처 확인' with '수집된 자료 활용' and '원문이나 수집된 자료'.
Standardized visible source-related labels to '수집된 자료' instead of '자료 확인', '참고 자료', or '수집 자료'.
Added regression coverage that Day 1 visible concepts and planned outline do not expose 'RAG'.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-D_M7g05H.js

verification.name: customer-facing internal terminology search
verification.command: rg -n "자료 확인|참고 자료|수집 자료|검증 자료|RAG 근거|RAG 자료|RAG나|RAG 자료 활용" harness-os/edu-app/src/components/TrainingScreen.tsx tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py
verification.result: passed: no matches in VP-facing screen and regression tests

residual_risk: Internal code, prompt, env, and tests still use RAG as an implementation term.
If a user explicitly asks what RAG means, the safety coach still answers that question directly.
